calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Carolina Sams Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment For Damages
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 501 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant CGSF, LLC, DBA Carbon Grill.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:53:56 a.m. and concluding at 12:06:18 p.m.

Scott L. Johnson, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Carolina Sam.
No appearancce by Defendant CGSF, LLC DBA Carbon Grill.

Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application for Waiver of Witness Requirement and Permission to Proceed by Declaration Pursuant to San Francisco County Superior Court Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)(b) was filed on 08/24/2022.

Declaration of Plaintiff Carolina Sam in Support of Ex Parte Application for Waiver of Witness Requirement and Permission to Proceed by Declaration Pursuant to San Francisco County Superior Court Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)(b) is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

After review and consideration of Plaintiff's ex parte request, the court grants ex parte application. Order Granting Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application for Waiver of Witness Requirement and Permission to Proceed by Declaration Pursuant to San Francisco County Superior Court Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)(b)is signed and filed.

Plaintiff presents offer of proof and a summary of the facts as set forth on the record.

The matter is submitted.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Carolina Sam, and against Defendant CGSF, LLC, DBA Carbon Grill, as follows:

Past Due Rent: $43,755.00
Holdover Damages: $20,136.49
Attorney Fees: $3,900.00
Costs: $996.10

Total Judgment: $68,787,.59

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

Plaintiff Carolina Sams Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment For Damages
Off Calendar Aug-11-2022 Continued To Sep-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
